app.name: Interior AI
app.tagline: Coohom and Foyr render your design. We cost it, quantify it, and write the proposal — in your style, for your market.

home.title: Design operations, priced for your market
home.subtitle: Upload a floor plan and a brief. Get a concept, a quantified BOQ, a client proposal, and a render — priced in $ against US rates.
home.currencyNote: Amounts shown in $ (USD), before sales tax.

advisory.disclaimer: Rates are directional estimates and need local verification. Construction documents require sign-off by a licensed professional.

errors.validation_error: Some details are missing or need a second look.
errors.quota_exceeded: You've used every project on your plan. Upgrade to add more.
errors.provider_error: A service we rely on didn't respond. Please try again.
errors.server_error: Something went wrong on our side.

auth.title: Sign in to Interior AI
auth.subtitle: Use your email, or continue with GitHub.
auth.haveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account.

dashboard.title: Your projects
dashboard.placeholder: Projects arrive in Task 4. Your account and profile are live.

intake.title: New project
intake.subtitle: The brief drives everything downstream — concept, costing, and the proposal.

errors.validation_error: Some details are missing or need a second look.
errors.quota_exceeded: You've used every project on your plan. Upgrade to add more.
errors.provider_error: A service we rely on didn't respond. Please try again.
errors.server_error: Something went wrong on our side.

project.intakeUnreadable: This project's brief couldn't be read.

floorplan.title: Floor plan
floorplan.subtitle: Upload a plan for {project}, or enter the rooms yourself.
floorplan.uploadHint: PDF, JPEG, PNG, GIF or WebP
floorplan.parseFailed: We couldn't read that plan. You can enter the rooms yourself.
floorplan.checkFlagged: Some dimensions were hard to read — the flagged rooms are worth checking.

validate.readyHint: The brief is complete and your cultural guidance is confirmed.
validate.blockedTitle: This brief needs a few things first
validate.blockedHint: Design and costing run on these answers, so they have to be right before we start.

boq.title: BOQ — {count} items
boq.valueEngineering: Ways to bring this back to budget
boq.disclaimer: Rates are directional estimates and need local verification. Working drawings require sign-off by a licensed professional.

proposal.title: Proposal
proposal.linkNote: This link is private and expires in an hour.

render.timedOut: The render is taking longer than expected. Try again.

dna.title: Designer DNA
dna.subtitle: Upload past projects and we learn your style, so new concepts come out in your voice.
dna.thinHint: Fewer than {n} images gives a rough profile — it sharpens as you add more work.

billing.title: Plans & billing
billing.subtitle: Priced for {market}. Upgrade to run more projects.
billing.current: You are on {plan} — {used} of {quota} projects used.

agency.title: Agency
agency.subtitle: Every project across your studio's designers.
agency.noOrgs: You don't own an agency yet. Create an organization to see all your designers' projects here.
agency.noProjects: No projects in this organization yet.

branding.title: Branding & domains
branding.subtitle: Make the app your own — your name, colors, logo, and a custom domain for your clients.
branding.noOrgs: Create an organization first, then you can white-label it here.
branding.logoReady: Logo uploaded. Save to apply it.
branding.domainsHint: Point your own domain at the app. Add it here, set the DNS record shown, then verify.
branding.dnsHint: Set this DNS record at your registrar:
